source.title: AI Marketing Masterclass: From Beginner to Expert in 60 Minutes
source.creator: Greg Isenberg
source.guest: James Dickerson — growth marketer, Claude Code power user, The Boring Marketer

agent_1_report.title: Overview of Main Points and Tools
agent_1_report.core_thesis: You can build a complete marketing system — research, positioning, landing page, lead magnet, ad creative, SEO content, and traffic strategy — in roughly one hour from the terminal using Claude Code with stacked skills and MCPs. The key differentiator is spending time on RESEARCH FIRST before any content generation.

tools_mentioned.name: Perplexity MCP
tools_mentioned.what_it_does: Deep market research directly from the terminal. Analyzes competitors, finds market gaps, builds rich context documents that feed into all downstream content generation.
tools_mentioned.key_insight: Spending 1 hour on upfront research produces dramatically better outputs than jumping straight into prompting. This context loading step is the foundation everything else builds on.

tools_mentioned.name: Playwright MCP
tools_mentioned.what_it_does: Browser automation for scraping competitor websites. Gathers competitive intelligence — pricing, positioning, messaging, features — for analysis.
tools_mentioned.key_insight: Combined with Perplexity, gives comprehensive competitive landscape without manual browsing.

tools_mentioned.name: Firecrawl
tools_mentioned.what_it_does: Web scraping and crawling MCP. Extracts structured data from websites for competitive analysis and market research.
tools_mentioned.key_insight: Part of the recommended minimal MCP stack: Perplexity + Firecrawl + Playwright.

tools_mentioned.name: Remotion
tools_mentioned.what_it_does: Programmatic video ad creation from the terminal. Creates ads in multiple formats (vertical, horizontal, square) with custom branding at zero cost. React-based video framework.
tools_mentioned.key_insight: Eliminates need for video editing software for ad creation. Can generate multiple format variations automatically.

tools_mentioned.name: Positioning Angles Skill
tools_mentioned.what_it_does: Claude Code skill that analyzes market research and surfaces 5 distinct positioning angles. Then evaluates each to pick the strongest one.
tools_mentioned.key_insight: In the demo, it found 'Boring Money' — an anti-agency positioning for overlooked trade businesses that resonated deeply.

tools_mentioned.name: Direct Response Copywriting Skill
tools_mentioned.what_it_does: Generates conversion-focused copy based on research context and positioning. Direct response style — focused on action, not brand awareness.
tools_mentioned.key_insight: Copy quality is dramatically better when fed rich research context vs. raw prompting.

tools_mentioned.name: Anthropic's Front End Design Skill
tools_mentioned.what_it_does: Creates landing pages directly in Claude Code. Full front-end design and development from the terminal.
tools_mentioned.key_insight: Landing page creation integrated into the same workflow as research and copywriting — no context switching.

tools_mentioned.name: Orchestrator Skill
tools_mentioned.what_it_does: Guides what to do next in the marketing workflow. Removes the 'I have a landing page, now what?' paralysis by suggesting next steps.
tools_mentioned.key_insight: Acts as a project manager — keeps the funnel build moving forward systematically.

tools_mentioned.name: Lead Magnet Skill
tools_mentioned.what_it_does: Creates lead magnets (PDFs, guides, checklists) as part of the conversion funnel.
tools_mentioned.key_insight: Integrated into the funnel workflow — created after landing page, before traffic strategy.

tools_mentioned.name: Keyword Research and Traffic Strategy Skills
tools_mentioned.what_it_does: Identifies underserved local markets, generates SEO content pages, produces paid ad strategy informed by positioning and competitive intelligence.
tools_mentioned.key_insight: Traffic strategy is the last step — only built after positioning, landing page, and lead magnet are solid.

tools_mentioned.name: Idea Browser
tools_mentioned.what_it_does: Tool to find startup ideas and trends. Greg calls it the #1 tool for finding ideas.

tools_mentioned.name: The Vibe Marketer
tools_mentioned.what_it_does: Resources for people into vibe marketing/marketing with AI.

key_strategies.name: Research-First Foundation
key_strategies.description: Spend a full hour on deep market research BEFORE creating any marketing content. Most people jump into prompting immediately — that's where AI slop comes from. Rich context = better output.
key_strategies.workflow: Perplexity MCP → competitor analysis → gap identification → context documents → THEN content creation

key_strategies.name: Skills as Expert Instruction Manuals
key_strategies.description: Claude Code skills encode the expert perspective (the last 10-20%) that separates great output from generic AI. They're not just prompts — they're methodology.
key_strategies.implication: Building custom skills with domain expertise is the highest-leverage activity.

key_strategies.name: Minimal MCP Stack
key_strategies.description: Keep MCPs simple: Perplexity + Firecrawl + Playwright covers 90% of needs. Don't overcomplicate.
key_strategies.implication: Focus on mastering 3 MCPs rather than installing 20.

key_strategies.name: Full Funnel in One Session
key_strategies.description: Build research → positioning → copy → landing page → lead magnet → ads → SEO → traffic strategy in one continuous Claude Code session. Context carries through.
key_strategies.implication: The power is in the accumulated context — each step informs the next.

key_strategies.name: Programmatic Video Ads with Remotion
key_strategies.description: Create video ads from code — React components rendered as video. Multiple formats, custom branding, zero cost. Terminal-native.
key_strategies.implication: Eliminates the bottleneck of manual video editing for ad creation.

key_strategies.name: Orchestrator Pattern
key_strategies.description: Use an orchestrator skill/agent to decide what to do next. Removes decision paralysis and keeps the workflow moving.
key_strategies.implication: The orchestrator is the project manager of the agent system.

key_data_points: Full marketing funnel built in ~1 hour from the terminal
Targeting boring local businesses doing $2-10M revenue
5 positioning angles surfaced, 1 selected as winner
71,568 views in ~6 weeks = high interest in this workflow

three_main_sections.1_research_first: Deep market research with Perplexity MCP. Analyze competitors, find gaps, build context. This is the foundation.
three_main_sections.2_live_build: Build AI marketing agency funnel: positioning angles → copywriting → landing page → lead magnet → orchestrator decides next steps.
three_main_sections.3_traffic_strategy: Keyword research, SEO content pages, paid ad strategy. All informed by the positioning and competitive intelligence from earlier steps.

agent_2_report.title: AUROS AI Integration Brainstorm

critical_integrations.implementation: Replace or augment Tavily with Perplexity MCP for deeper, more contextual research. Perplexity provides synthesized answers, not just links. Use as the FIRST step in every client pipeline — 1 hour of deep research before any content generation.
specific_changes: Add Perplexity API to .env and config.py
Create agents/shared/perplexity.py wrapper
Modify audit_agent.py to use Perplexity for competitor analysis (deeper than Tavily)
Modify trend_agent.py to use Perplexity for trend synthesis
Add a 'deep research' phase as Step 0 in client pipeline

critical_integrations.implementation: Replace BeautifulSoup scraping in audit_agent.py with Playwright for JavaScript-rendered pages. Use Firecrawl for bulk competitor website crawling. Currently our audit misses dynamic content.
specific_changes: Install playwright: pip install playwright && playwright install
Create agents/shared/browser.py for Playwright-based scraping
Modify audit_agent.py to use Playwright for website analysis
Modify brand_agent.py to use Playwright for full page rendering (better color/font extraction)
Add competitor scraping to audit pipeline

critical_integrations.implementation: THIS IS A GAME-CHANGER for AUROS. Currently Agent 6 outputs FFmpeg commands and CapCut specs that a human must execute. Remotion lets us CREATE the actual video ads programmatically. For The Imagine Team, we could generate exhibition ad videos automatically.
specific_changes: Install Remotion: npm init video@latest
Create agents/video_generator/ with Remotion templates for exhibition ads
Build React-based video templates: 15s vertical, 30s horizontal, 60s cinematic
Integrate with exhibition_content.py — auto-generate video files from scripts
Output: Actual MP4 files ready for upload to TikTok/Instagram/YouTube
Template variables: exhibition name, key message, CTA, brand colors
critical_integrations.effort: Heavy lift (8-12 hours) but highest ROI improvement

critical_integrations.implementation: Build a dedicated positioning analysis step that surfaces 5 distinct angles before building any plan or proposal. Currently our plan_agent.py jumps to recommendations without exploring positioning space.
specific_changes: Create agents/positioning/positioning_agent.py
Input: audit data + brand data + competitive research
Output: 5 positioning angles with scoring (market fit, differentiation, resonance)
Integrate as Step 2.5 in pipeline (after brand extraction, before plan building)
Feed winning position into plan_agent.py and proposal_agent.py

critical_integrations.implementation: Add direct response copywriting frameworks to our knowledge base and inject into content generation prompts. Currently our copy is good but not conversion-optimized.
specific_changes: Add DR copy frameworks to knowledge_base/kb_copywriting.json (AIDA already there, add: Problem-Agitate-Solve variants, Eugene Schwartz awareness levels, Gary Halbert techniques)
Create a 'conversion copy mode' in content generation that prioritizes action over awareness
Modify exhibition_content.py to generate DR-style ad copy variations
Add copy scoring: rate each piece on clarity, urgency, specificity, CTA strength

critical_integrations.implementation: Build a master orchestrator that decides what to do next in the client pipeline. Currently we run agents manually in sequence. An orchestrator would automate the flow and handle decision points.
specific_changes: Create agents/orchestrator/orchestrator_agent.py
Input: current pipeline state (which agents have run, what outputs exist)
Logic: evaluate completeness, quality scores, suggest next step
Output: next agent to run + context to feed it
Eventually: fully autonomous pipeline where orchestrator runs the entire 11-step process

critical_integrations.implementation: We already generate HTML deliverables. But we could extend this to generate actual CLIENT landing pages — not just internal documents. For The Imagine Team, generate a ticket-selling landing page.
specific_changes: Create agents/landing_page/landing_page_agent.py
Input: brand data + positioning + copy + visual direction
Output: Complete HTML/CSS landing page optimized for ticket sales
Include: hero section, social proof, experience highlights, pricing, CTA buttons
Deploy: could host on Vercel/Netlify with one command

critical_integrations.implementation: Add lead magnet creation to our content pipeline. For exhibitions, lead magnets could be: 'Insider Guide to Harry Potter Exhibition', 'What to Expect at Titanic Exhibition' PDFs that capture emails before ticket purchase.
specific_changes: Create agents/lead_magnet/lead_magnet_agent.py
Input: exhibition data + audience research
Output: PDF/HTML lead magnet (guide, checklist, behind-the-scenes content)
Integration: add to conversion funnel as email capture step before ticket CTA

critical_integrations.implementation: Add keyword research to our plan builder output. Currently we suggest content pillars but don't identify specific keywords or search volume. For exhibitions, target: 'harry potter exhibition [city]', 'titanic experience tickets', etc.
specific_changes: Integrate keyword research API (Google Keyword Planner or free alternatives like Ubersuggest API)
Add SEO keyword targets to content calendar entries
Generate SEO-optimized content briefs alongside social content
Track keyword rankings in performance_agent.py

new_capabilities_to_build.name: Deep Research Phase (Step 0)
new_capabilities_to_build.description: Add a mandatory 'deep research' step before any client pipeline work. Use Perplexity + Firecrawl + Playwright to build a comprehensive context document that feeds every downstream agent.
new_capabilities_to_build.rationale: James's core insight: research-first = dramatically better output. We're currently skipping this.

new_capabilities_to_build.name: Programmatic Video Generation
new_capabilities_to_build.description: Use Remotion to turn our video scripts into actual video files. Templates for 15s/30s/60s in vertical/horizontal/square formats.
new_capabilities_to_build.rationale: Eliminates the biggest bottleneck: we generate great scripts but can't produce the actual videos. This closes the gap.

new_capabilities_to_build.name: Positioning Analysis Agent
new_capabilities_to_build.description: Dedicated agent that surfaces 5 positioning angles and evaluates each for market fit, differentiation, and resonance.
new_capabilities_to_build.rationale: Currently we skip positioning exploration and go straight to planning. This step dramatically improves strategic quality.

new_capabilities_to_build.name: Pipeline Orchestrator
new_capabilities_to_build.description: Master agent that manages the 11-step pipeline flow, decides next steps, handles branching logic.
new_capabilities_to_build.rationale: Would make the system truly autonomous — currently requires manual intervention between agents.

workflow_improvements: Research-first: Add Perplexity deep research as Step 0 before audit
Context accumulation: Each agent's output feeds into the next agent's context (already doing this, but could be more systematic)
Quality gates: Add quality checks between pipeline stages (orchestrator pattern)
Multi-format output: Generate same content in multiple formats simultaneously (Remotion for video, HTML for web, PDF for email)
competitive_advantages: Remotion video generation: Most agencies can't auto-generate actual video ads. We could.
Research depth: Perplexity + Playwright gives us competitive intelligence most agencies do manually
Full funnel in one system: Research → strategy → content → ads → analytics. No tool switching.
Speed: What takes agencies weeks, we do in hours

sprint_1_this_week: Install Perplexity MCP and integrate into audit pipeline
Add DR copywriting frameworks to knowledge base
sprint_2_next_week: Install Playwright and replace BeautifulSoup in audit/brand agents
Set up Remotion and build first exhibition video template
Create lead magnet agent for exhibition guides
sprint_3_week_after: Build full Remotion template library (15s/30s/60s × 3 formats)
Integrate keyword research into plan builder
